SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DARRI SARRIA LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT GABRIEL LOPEZ SANCHEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, GABRIEL LOPEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00, COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE AMOUNTS.
